gist.headline: A novel idea
gist.blurb: NovelCraft AI just landed in the community showcase! Write entire novels directly in your browser—no servers, no accounts, just pure local creativity.
gist.summary: Added NovelCraft AI to the community apps showcase, enabling users to write novels entirely in-browser with local execution.
gist.impact: Writers can now discover and use a fully local, zero-setup AI writing environment directly from the community showcase.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about a novel-writing app called NovelCraft AI that runs locally in the browser. Key symbols: books, writing, typewriter, browser window, cozy study. Characters: Polly the bee wearing a tiny author's beret, typing on a retro keyboard or reading a thick book.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny author's beret, typing on a retro mechanical keyboard connected to a glowing monitor displaying a digital book. Stacks of pixelated books and a warm cup of tea sit on a wooden desk. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
